title: KD Hopsi Polzela

infobox.value: or simply **Hopsi**, is a Slovenian [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") team based in [Polzela](/wiki/Polzela "Polzela") that competes in the [Slovenian First League](/wiki/Premier_A_Slovenian_Basketball_League "Premier A Slovenian Basketball League"), the top tier of Slovenian basketball. During their golden years in the 1990s, they were known as Kovinotehna Savinjska Polzela due to sponsorship reasons.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Basketball team in Polzela, Slovenia

| Hopsi Polzela | |
| --- | --- |

| Leagues | [Slovenian First League](/wiki/Premier_A_Slovenian_Basketball_League "Premier A Slovenian Basketball League") |
| Founded | 1972; 54 years ago (1972) |
| Arena | Polzela Sports Hall |
| Location | [Polzela](/wiki/Polzela "Polzela"), Slovenia |
| Team colors | Yellow, blue |
| Head coach | Saša Mateničarski |
| Championships | **1** [Slovenian Cup](/wiki/Slovenian_Basketball_Cup "Slovenian Basketball Cup") |
| Website | [Official website](https://hopsi.si/) |
|  | |
| |  |  | | --- | --- | | Home jersey    Team colours  **[Home](/wiki/Basketball_uniform "Basketball uniform")** | Away jersey    Team colours  **[Away](/wiki/Basketball_uniform "Basketball uniform")** | | |

**Košarkarsko društvo Hopsi Polzela**, commonly referred to as **Hopsi Polzela** or simply **Hopsi**, is a Slovenian [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") team based in [Polzela](/wiki/Polzela "Polzela") that competes in the [Slovenian First League](/wiki/Premier_A_Slovenian_Basketball_League "Premier A Slovenian Basketball League"), the top tier of Slovenian basketball. During their golden years in the 1990s, they were known as Kovinotehna Savinjska Polzela due to sponsorship reasons.

## Honours

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=KD_Hopsi_Polzela&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Honours")]

* **[Slovenian First League](/wiki/Premier_A_Slovenian_Basketball_League "Premier A Slovenian Basketball League")**

:   * Runners-up: 1995, 1997, 1998

* **[1. B SKL / 2. SKL](/wiki/Slovenian_Second_Basketball_League "Slovenian Second Basketball League")** *(second tier)*

:   * **Winners**: 2007, 2025
    * Runners-up: 2006

* **[Slovenian Cup](/wiki/Slovenian_Basketball_Cup "Slovenian Basketball Cup")**

:   * **Winners**: 1996
    * Runners-up: 1994, 1997, 2019

* **[Slovenian Supercup](/wiki/Slovenian_Basketball_Supercup "Slovenian Basketball Supercup")**

:   * Runners-up: 2019
